name: naturopathic cure tinnitus

phase_0.boundary_condition: The patient's complete physiological and neurological homeostasis

VINIT.justification: The initial void where natural silence is lost to phantom noise; the uninitialized state of the auditory system before intervention.

TANCH.justification: The closed boundary of complete systemic balance, where the body and mind have fully integrated the cure and auditory peace is restored.

AFWD.justification: Forward morphism of administering internal herbs, supplements, and dietary changes to build systemic health and reduce inflammation.

AREV.justification: Reverse/descent morphism of applying external somatic therapies (acupuncture, massage) to release physical tension and reverse stress pathways.

CLINK.justification: Sequential chaining of diagnostic insights and multiple naturopathic modalities into a cohesive, unified treatment plan.

IMSCRIB.justification: The patient's self-recognition and active tracking of the ringing's volume, pitch, and emotional impact.

FSPLIT.justification: Splits the unified patient health state into two distinct treatment pathways: Internal Physiological and External Somatic.

FFUSE.justification: Reconstitutes the unified Patient Holistic Health State by merging the healed Internal and External pathways back into one baseline.

EVALT.justification: Positive evaluation of the T-arm, confirming reduced physiological inflammation and improved microcirculation.

EVALF.justification: Negative evaluation of the F-arm, acknowledging the brain's slow adaptation and initial resistance to neural habituation.

ENGAGR.justification: The paradice where the physical ringing is simultaneously still generated by the ear (true) but completely ignored by the brain (false), held without resolution.

IFIX.justification: The permanent, irreversible recording of the patient's new auditory baseline and treatment efficacy in their medical record.

phase_3.void_description: The raw, unassessed presence of phantom ringing before any naturopathic intervention, self-awareness, or diagnostic categorization.
phase_3.true_description: Affirmative healing state where physiological inflammation is reduced, circulation is improved, and somatic tension is released.
phase_3.false_description: Negative state of neurological resistance where the auditory cortex still hyper-focuses on the tinnitus frequency and perceives it as a threat.
phase_3.both_description: The paradice of habituation: the physical sound is still generated by the auditory system, but the brain no longer perceives it as a threat, both states held simultaneously.

steps.domain_action: Genesis of the tinnitus symptom, representing the initial void of lost silence and the onset of phantom noise.
Patient self-identification and biofeedback, where the individual recognizes and tracks the subjective reality of the ringing.
Reverse engineering the symptom through naturopathic diagnosis, descending into root causes like gut health, stress, or circulation.
Chaining the diagnostic findings into a unified, sequential naturopathic protocol tailored to the patient.
Branching the unified treatment protocol into two distinct pathways: Internal (Ingestibles) and External (Somatic).
T-arm forward morphism: Administering internal herbal, dietary, and supplemental interventions to build systemic health.
T-arm evaluation: Affirmative systemic response confirmed through reduced inflammation and improved microcirculation.
F-arm reverse morphism: Applying external somatic therapies like acupuncture and craniosacral massage to release physical tension.
F-arm evaluation: Acknowledging localized neurological resistance and the slow, non-linear adaptation of the brain to sound therapy.
Reconstituting the unified Patient Holistic Health State by merging the healed Internal and External pathways.
Entering the paradice of habituation, where the ringing is physically present but neurologically ignored, held simultaneously.
Permanent fixation of the new auditory baseline, treatment efficacy, and healed state in the patient's immutable medical record.
Terminal anchor: Achievement of holistic homeostasis, closing the boundary of the treatment cycle with restored auditory peace.

phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Neuro-Endocrine Signaling via the Vagus Nerve

phase_6.cycle_cost: Metabolic energy and vital force consumed during detoxification, tissue repair, and neural rewiring.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: High-entropy state of systemic inflammation, chronic stress, and chaotic neurological firing characteristic of active tinnitus.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: Low-entropy state of homeostasis, reduced inflammation, and organized neural habituation to the auditory signal.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The holistic cycle conserves entropy by redirecting the body's innate vital force to restore internal order rather than suppressing symptoms with high-entropy synthetic drugs.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → IMSCRIB → AREV → CLINK → FSPLIT → AFWD → EVALT → AREV → EVALF → FFUSE → ENGAGR → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: naturopathic cure tinnitus
-- Fingerprint: sig=(7,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=13
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(4, 9)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑠  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑼 → 𐑗  | identity — self-imscription
--   [2] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑠 → 𐑱  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [3] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑗 → 𐑚  | composition — regime coherence
--   [4] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [5] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑚 → 𐑙  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [6] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [7] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [8] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [9] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑳  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [10] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑙 → 𐑭  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [11] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑳 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [12] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def naturopathic_cure_tinnitus_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑠)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Genesis of the tinnitus symptom, representing the initial void of lost silenc...)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑼 𐑗)  -- [1] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Patient self-identification and biofeedback, where the individual recognizes ...)
  (.arrow 𐑗 𐑠 𐑱)  -- [2] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Reverse engineering the symptom through naturopathic diagnosis, descending in...)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑗 𐑚)  -- [3] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Chaining the diagnostic findings into a unified, sequential naturopathic prot...)
  -- FSPLIT [4] (gran := 𐑚) (Branching the unified treatment protocol into two distinct pathways: Internal (Ingestibles) and External (Somatic).) / FFUSE [9] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (3 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑾 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (T-arm forward morphism: Administering internal herbal, dietary, and supplemen...)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (T-arm evaluation: Affirmative systemic response confirmed through reduced inf...)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (F-arm reverse morphism: Applying external somatic therapies like acupuncture ...)
      -- F-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [8] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (F-arm evaluation: Acknowledging localized neurological resistance and the slo...))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [9]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑳)  -- [9] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (Reconstituting the unified Patient Holistic Health State by merging the healed Internal and External pathways.)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑙 𐑭)  -- [10] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Entering the paradice of habituation, where the ringing is physically present...)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑳 𐑡)  -- [11] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Permanent fixation of the new auditory baseline, treatment efficacy, and heal...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [12] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Terminal anchor: Achievement of holistic homeostasis, closing the boundary of...)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def naturopathic_cure_tinnitus_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (naturopathic_cure_tinnitus_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def naturopathic_cure_tinnitus_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (naturopathic_cure_tinnitus_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem naturopathic_cure_tinnitus_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide
